movie.synopsis: Set in Pollachi, the story follows a powerful landlord, Sivalingam Mandradiyar, who becomes obsessed with a rising actor, Kukanth Kumar, believing he is the next M.G.R. He pours his wealth into shaping the actor’s career and political future. But as ambition and fame grow, so does the risk of downfall. Will it lead to power or ruin?
